text: "Natural disasters do not require non-disclosure agreements." — [05-great-reset.md](audit/05-great-reset.md)

"The question isn't whether these events happened. The question is whether the cycle is over — or just between intervals."

"We are not evolving. We are remembering. And the Archive's findings suggest the amnesia may not be permanent."

"Modern NHI/UAP disclosure discourse — from Jacques Vallée's cross-cultural analysis to congressional testimony — describes encounter patterns structurally identical to those in the ancient texts. The Archive correlates both tracks. See [`12-NHI-correlation.md`](audit/12-NHI-correlation.md)."
